# Led Controller Avmm — Register Map

<!-- Auto-generated by IPCraft from led_controller_avmm.ip.yml -->
<!-- managed: false — add notes below freely; this file will not be overwritten -->

Avalon-MM peripheral for the DE10-Nano LED demo (cvsoc roadmap Phase 2.2). Drives 8 board LEDs from a software-writable pattern register and exposes a free-running heartbeat status bit with a sticky change-of-state event.


**Bus interface:** AVMM
**Data width:** 32 bits
**Address width:** 4 bits

---

## Register Summary

| Offset | Name | Access | Description |
|--------|------|--------|-------------|
| `0x00` | `VERSION` | `read-only` | IP version |
| `0x04` | `LED_PATTERN` | `read-write` | LED output pattern |
| `0x08` | `EVENTS` | `read-write` | Live heartbeat level plus a sticky change-of-state flag (monitorChangeOf automation through the Avalon-MM wrapper).
 |

---

## `VERSION` — Offset `0x00`

IP version

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|------|-------|--------|-------|-------------|
| `[7:0]` | `MINOR` | `read-only` | `0x0` | — |
| `[15:8]` | `MAJOR` | `read-only` | `0x1` | — |

## `LED_PATTERN` — Offset `0x04`

LED output pattern

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|------|-------|--------|-------|-------------|
| `[7:0]` | `PATTERN` | `read-write` | `0x0` | Bit N drives LED[N] |

## `EVENTS` — Offset `0x08`

Live heartbeat level plus a sticky change-of-state flag (monitorChangeOf automation through the Avalon-MM wrapper).


| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|------|-------|--------|-------|-------------|
| `[0:0]` | `HEARTBEAT_ACTIVE` | `read-only` | `0x0` | Toggles roughly once per second while clk runs |
| `[1:1]` | `HEARTBEAT_TOGGLED` | `write-1-to-clear` | `0x0` | Sticky flag, set on every HEARTBEAT_ACTIVE transition |
